nasb.text: The sons of Manasseh were Asriel, whom his Aramean concubine bore; she bore Machir the father of Gilead.

esv.text: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his Aramean concubine bore; she bore Machir the father of Gilead.

cnv.text: 瑪拿西的兒子是亞斯列，是他亞蘭籍的妾所生的；她又生了基列的父親瑪吉。

ccb.text: 玛拿西的妾是亚兰人，她给玛拿西生的儿子是亚斯列，另外还生了基列的父亲玛吉。
